design_plan: Python RNG Execution: seed('Super for local service businesses handling bookings, quotes, and customer replies' + 'niche_landing' + 'local service businesses' + '2026-07-06T00:03:15.509640+00:00') -> hero='workflow-command-center', font='Cabinet Grotesk', components=['gapless-bento-grid','workflow-playbook-timeline','implementation-checklist'], gsap=['pinned-chapter-scroll','hover-physics'] | AIDA Check: Nav ✅ Attention Hero ✅ Interest Proof/Bento ✅ Desire Motion ✅ Action CTA ✅ | Font Selection: Cabinet Grotesk (Fontshare) ✅ | Hero Math Verification: H1 max-width 1120px, clamp(44px–72px) → 2–3 lines ✅ | Bento Density Verification: grid-template-columns repeat(auto-fit,minmax(280px,1fr)) + grid-auto-flow: dense; no empty gaps ✅ | GSAP Motion Selection: pinned chapter + hover physics ✅ | Label Sweep & Button Check: no cheap meta-labels; black/white pill contrast verified ✅
headline: Super for local service businesses handling bookings, quotes, and customer replies

site_brief.audience: local service businesses handling bookings, quotes, and customer replies
site_brief.goal: Create a conversion-focused landing page for this audience. Tie current market evidence to pain points, then show how Super can operate apps and reuse a computer-use cache for repeated work. Include a long-form field guide for this niche with concrete workflows, how-to steps, role-specific examples, objections, and a setup checklist.
queries: local service businesses handling bookings, quotes, and customer replies AI assistant
local service businesses handling bookings, quotes, and customer replies personal AI agent
site_brief.title: Super for local service businesses handling bookings, quotes, and customer replies

summary: A premium niche landing page showing how Super’s personal AI agents operate real software, reuse a computer-use cache for repeated office work, and help local service teams respond faster to customers without brittle integrations.
